title: Polystichum rufobarbatum
taxonomy: Polystichum rufobarbatum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of evergreen fern that is native to China. This species belongs to the genus Polystichum, which comprises various species of shield ferns. Polystichum rufobarbatum is further classified into the subfamily Dryopteridoideae and the order Polypodiales. The exact classification of Polystichum rufobarbatum is within the kingdom Plantae.
uses: Polystichum rufobarbatum is a species of fern native to China, and it has been traditionally used in medicine. Its medicinal uses include treating various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems.
